# defaultNodeID

**Data field**

The ID of the default node.

## Overview

The node to be displayed when the file is first opened.

## Data fields

- **majorVersion**: The major version number of the file format.
- **minorVersion**: The minor version number of the file format.
- **nameAtomID**: The ID of the string atom that contains the name of the scene.
- **vrWorldFlags**: A set of flags for the VR world.
- **reserved1**: Reserved.
- **reserved2**: Reserved.
